title: Keybind Search
description: A simple way to search and filter Minecraft keybinds by name, key, or mod. Built for NeoForge.
body:
Keybind Search

Keybind Search is a lightweight client-side mod that makes managing your controls easier. Instead of scrolling endlessly through dozens of keybinds, you get a searchable list with a simple button right on the Controls screen.

Features

  • Search by keybind name
  • Search by the key itself
  • Search by mod name
  • Mods grouped under clear headers
  • Each entry has a Rebind button for quick changes

Why use it?

When you’re running a big modpack, finding the right key can be frustrating. Keybind Search solves this by letting you filter, organize, and rebind everything at a glance without conflicts.

✔ Works alongside EMI, REI, and JEI
✔ Simple, lightweight, and designed for NeoForge 1.21.1
